hooks.command: jq -e '.tool_input.command // "" | test("git commit.*Decompile")' >/dev/null 2>&1 && for p in /home/dan/Documents/code/decomp/projects/*/; do if [ -x "$p/.claude/hooks/post-decompile-check.sh" ] && (cd "$p" && git log -1 --format=%s 2>/dev/null | grep -q Decompile); then (cd "$p" && bash .claude/hooks/post-decompile-check.sh); fi; done || true
